title: The Bar Turns Against the Straw Hats
main_description: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
key_events: The Bar Turns Against the Straw Hats
Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
